title: ouratea lucens
intro: Ouratea lucens, also known as the Ouratea lucens plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ouratea lucens include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Ouratea lucens are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
